Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}How many guests? Smoking or non-smoking?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Hm? That leaf that's in your hand...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh! Do you mean to tell me this a leaf from that persimmon tree?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It must have grown quite a bit to produce such splendid leaves...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Wait, so you aren't here to buy books? Did you come visit just to show this to us?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I knew right from the start that you were a kind young man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I've known from the start that you were a kind young man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I've been meaning to go see that tree for a while now, but I'm not sure if these stumpy old legs will make it that far...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}...That wasn't meant to be a pun. You know, "stumpy," "tree stump"... Get it? Ahaha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Let me introduce my wife, Mitsuko. I'm Bunkichi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}If you don't mind, would you tell us your name?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They seem to have taken a liking to me[n]after talking about the persimmon tree.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've become acquainted with Bunkichi-san[n]and Mitsuko-san, the elderly couple.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted with the elderly couple[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
